mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_staff WHERE deleted = 0
AND (job_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, job_no, name, gender, age, phone, email, id_card, position_name, clinic_name, department_name, role_name, address, creator, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_staff WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_staff (job_no, name, gender, age, phone, email, id_card, position_name, clinic_name, department_name, role_name, address, creator, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{jobNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{idCard}, #{positionName}, #{clinicName}, #{departmentName}, #{roleName}, #{address}, #{creator}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_staff
job_no = #{jobNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, id_card = #{idCard}, position_name = #{positionName}, clinic_name = #{clinicName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, role_name = #{roleName}, address = #{address}, creator = #{creator}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
